h2: Fire as a focal point of your space should be relaxing, fuss-free and a natural fit to your life. Learn how nonstop innovation evokes the experiences you want as you gather with family and friends.

paragraphs: Fire as a focal point of your space should be relaxing, fuss-free and a natural fit to your life. Learn how nonstop innovation evokes the experiences you want as you gather with family and friends.

Our most advanced intermittent-pilot ignition system makes operating your fireplace simple, smart and safe. Select from the IntelliFire app, touchscreen remote control or wireless wall switch for a solution that fits your lifestyle.
The IntelliFire® app enables you to control your fire from anywhere so a cozy environment greets you when you walk in the door. Then it responds to the sound of your voice with a smart speaker.

Control all the features of your gas fireplace—from flame height to fan speed and more—with a simple tap. Safety features include a child lock and timer mode to enjoy your fireplace with peace of mind.

Turn on instant ambiance with a wireless switch. Live in a cold climate? Activate climate mode to reduce condensation on your fireplace glass. To see if a wall switch works with your fireplace, contact your local Heat & Glo dealer.
The IntelliFire app lets you control your fire from anywhere with a Wi-Fi connection, so you walk into comfort at home. From there it responds to your voice to fit the way you live.
Control where you want the heat—and how much—to enjoy a beautiful fire throughout the year. Move warmth to other areas of the home (even outside) or place your TV or artwork right over the fireplace.
Choose from the widest array of solutions to enjoy your fire year-round, place your TV above the fireplace and run wall materials up to the edge in a clean finish.
Disperse heat naturally (no fan) into the room, lowering surface temperatures so you can place a TV or artwork just 12" above the fireplace with no mantel. Choose side, front or open-wall registers.
Enjoy your fire for hours without heat buildup while warming up other rooms. Keep your desired temperature, moving up to 50 percent of the warm air behind the walls to where you want it.
When you don’t want extra warmth inside your home, transfer up to 40 percent of it outside. You can enjoy your fireplace year-round—even in warmer weather or a milder climate.
Bring the warmth from your fireplace to the rest of your home, up to 20 feet away. Place your TV 12" above the fireplace. No mantel required.* Only available on the Cosmo gas fireplace.
Our patented ceramic firebox radiates up to 25 percent more heat, warming rooms faster with less fuel, increasing efficiency and reducing heating costs.
Rated one of the top breakthroughs in residential construction, it ensures the highest air quality by removing all fireplace fumes and combustion exhaust from your space while improving performance.
